summary: Session 4 tested: (1) HOUR BUG on /rdv/:id — FIXED and confirmed stable across 4 open/edit/save cycles (2026-07-25T15:30 stays 15:30, DB stores 2026-07-25T15:30:00.000Z unchanged). (2) Backend finish() with stylists + sequential invoice_number F-2026-XXXX — WORKS via API (F-2026-0004 generated on new UI finish; re-finish → 400; counter atomic). (3) Client space /c/<token> tab-factures — WORKS: invoices-section renders 5 invoices, F-2026-0001 shows 'Coupe Homme par Marley' + 'Coupe + Barbe par Julien', legacy RDVs show 'par Julien' default and 'FACTURE' placeholder. (4) CRITICAL FRONTEND BUG FOUND: the stylist selection UI is disconnected from the finish payload — the `finish()` handler in AppointmentForm.jsx builds a payload WITHOUT the `stylists` field, so choosing Marley for a service has NO effect. UI test proved: clicked stylist-svc_9bb2d107ea-Marley → after finish, backend has stylist=Julien. Regression checks pass: 43/43 pytest, all 4 client-space tabs OK, edit-mode-toggle + save-rdv-btn + recurrence-section + client-risk-banner all render.

minor.issue: Legacy 'done' RDVs pre-invoice-feature keep invoice_number=null and are rendered as 'FACTURE' (no number) in the UI. Spec said 'chacun avec invoice_number'. Consider a backfill migration to assign numbers to older done RDVs, or explicitly document that only post-feature invoices are numbered.

ui_bugs.issue: The finish() handler (l.139-152) builds its payload with only {payment_mode, price_final, duration_minutes} and NEVER includes `stylists`. Consequence: the whole per-service stylist selection UI (stylist-section pills) is dead — Marley is visually selectable but never sent to POST /appointments/{rid}/finish. Reproduced end-to-end: clicked stylist-svc_9bb2d107ea-Marley on a fresh RDV, hit finish-rdv-btn, then GET /appointments returned stylist='Julien' for that service, and the resulting F-2026-0004 invoice shows 'par Julien' in the client space. Backend accepts stylists correctly (verified via curl + pytest).

integration_issues.issue: Missing `stylists: stylists` (or filtered subset) in the finish payload — one-line fix required.

action_items: URGENT — Fix AppointmentForm.jsx finish(): include `stylists` in the payload. Suggested patch: `const payload = { payment_mode: paymentMode, price_final: form.price_final_override ?? preview.final, duration_minutes: duration === '' ? null : parseInt(duration), stylists };` (or `Object.keys(stylists).length ? stylists : undefined`). Backend already accepts it — this is a plumbing miss only.
Optional: backfill invoice_number on legacy done RDVs so client space shows F-YYYY-XXXX for every historical invoice.
critical_code_review_comments: AppointmentForm.jsx finish() is out of sync with its own state — the `stylists` state is set up, hydrated from server, wired into the JSX pills, but the submit handler drops it. Suggest a small e2e/smoke test that finishes a RDV with a non-default stylist and re-reads it (same pattern as this iteration's playwright script).

PUT /appointments/{rid} does not preserve per-service `stylist` when the frontend re-sends the services list, because compute_appointment_totals rebuilds services from scratch. If a scheduled RDV had stylists partially chosen at creation, an unrelated PUT will silently reset them to 'Julien'. Not blocking today (stylist is only set at finish) but worth aware.
Client space renders legacy invoices with the string 'FACTURE' via a fallback — cleaner UX would either show 'F-—' or backfill the numbers.

success_rate.frontend: 80% — hour bug fixed & verified; stylist selection UI broken (payload missing)

test_credentials: PIN 123456; Sophie cli_e998044705; token _V-HRjKzLbQYJU0pPRHlad_44GARhDU0; reference invoice rdv_037b0f8120 = F-2026-0001
seed_data_creation: Created 2 temporary RDVs during UI testing (rdv_ceaba4423e for hour-stability, rdv_854c5577f7 for finish flow). Both deleted at end. F-2026-0004 was consumed by the finish test (counter is now at 4). rdv_037b0f8120 / F-2026-0001 untouched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hour bug fix (isoToLocalInput) works — no need to retest unless the helper is touched. When the stylists-in-payload bug is fixed, re-run the second Playwright block from this iteration: create RDV with 2 services → click stylist-svc_9bb2d107ea-Marley → finish-rdv-btn → GET /appointments → assert services[0].stylist === 'Marley'. Backend pytest at tests/test_invoice_stylists.py covers the API path.
rca of the issue: Hour bug (fixed by main agent): datetime-local input received `existing.date.slice(0,16)` which was UTC, but on save `new Date(form.date).toISOString()` reinterprets the value as LOCAL, causing a tz offset drift each round-trip. The new isoToLocalInput() helper subtracts getTimezoneOffset before slicing, so what the user sees matches what will be sent back verbatim. Verified: 4 successive open/save cycles keep 2026-07-25T15:30 identical in both the input and the DB. Stylist bug (new, unfixed): AppointmentForm.jsx finish() forgets to spread `stylists` into the POST body — plumbing regression from the feature work.
